caveats: This analyzes the existing candidate universe only. A missing row means no current graph-validated candidate fits the p90 bound, not that a better hand-designed route is impossible.
The next route-design task should create smaller legal single-car loops for the missing trail groups, or explicitly document why the p90 bound must be relaxed for those segments.
